name: Elemental Planet Stabilization
summary: The gods contained runaway elemental force by isolating Fire, Ocean, Wind, and Rock into visible planetary bodies whose continuing influence structures day-night cycles, weather, water regularity, and orbital stability.

stabilization_roles.Planet of Fire: supports day-night cycles and countered catastrophic flooding through heat and evaporation
stabilization_roles.Planet of Ocean: countered infernos and volcanic devastation and preserves water-cycle regularity
stabilization_roles.Planet of Wind: dispersed astral storms and established normal airflow
stabilization_roles.Planet of Rock: sealed fissures and stabilized orbital and tectonic structure
